name: Spinach and Lentil or Chicken Dhansak.
recipeIngredient: 1 green chili, de-seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large, flameproof casserole over medium heat.
2. Gently cook the onions for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
3. Add garlic and chili, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in cumin, coriander, garam marsala, cardamom, turmeric, and chili powder.
5. Add lentils, tomatoes, and water; stir to combine.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
7. Stir in spinach, coriander, mint, and black pepper; simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Variation:
CHICKEN DHANSAK
Add one small chicken breast per serving after browning the chicken breasts. Add at the same time as the lentils.
